_note: Client #1 — West Side Comedy Club, New York NY. First SMB pilot. Free for 3 months to prove the model. Fill in all TBD fields once owner details are confirmed.
tone: fun, casual, hype — like a friend telling you about a great show in NYC
welcome_message: Thanks for joining West Side Comedy Club! Really glad you're here. You'll hear from us when something worth knowing about is happening at the club.
signup_question: One quick question: who's a comedian you love, or what kind of comedy are you into? (standup, improv, dark humor, crowd work, etc.)
value_content_topics: behind the scenes at the club
what makes a great comedy show
how to get the best seats
signup_questions: What kind of comedy do you love most? Reply: STANDUP, IMPROV, or BOTH
How often do you want to hear from us? Reply: WEEKLY or DEALS ONLY

segments._note: question_key '0' = step 0 = 'What kind of comedy do you love most?'
segments.name: STANDUP

segments._note: question_key '1' = step 1 = 'How often do you want to hear from us?'
segments.name: DEALS
segments.description: Deals-only subscribers (send only when there's an offer)
